$comment: ADR-0075 / ADR-ACT-0285 (closure) — CANONICAL machine-readable E2E scenario manifest. The single source of truth for individual correlatable SCENARIOS (finer-grained than suite-registry.json, which tracks files/suites). Each scenario has a STABLE EXPLICIT scenarioId (never a sanitised test title); specs set it via test.use({scenarioId}) or the scenario() per-test annotation (e2e/support/correlation.ts). Validated by tools/e2e/validate-scenario-manifest. The observability-correlation harness expands this manifest (tools/e2e/scenario-manifest.mjs), queries Loki PER SCENARIO, and asserts per-stage completeness (every REQUIRED scenario observed) + the Tempo trace contract. correlation.logs/traces: required = a missing observation FAILS; best-effort = observed-if-present, never fails; none = not asserted. Dynamic suites (persona-matrix) declare a CONTROLLED expansion from persona-registry — runtime ids stay deterministic + validated, no per-persona duplication.

scenarios.owner: ADR-ACT-0285 Phase 3 (pipeline-health probe). A deterministic unauthenticated denial that proves the header->log->Loki->Tempo pipeline is alive; it has its OWN entry and does NOT substitute for any real scenario.
ADR-0025; ADR-ACT-0285. Runs on isolated dev/test ports (a separate platform-api not always shipping to Loki), so log correlation is best-effort, not required.
ADR-0075; ADR-ACT-0285 Phase 4. Crawls safe routes (mostly 2xx; INFO-filtered at LOG_LEVEL=warn), so correlation is best-effort.
ADR-0075; ADR-ACT-0285 Phase 6. Axe over safe 2xx routes; correlation best-effort.
ADR-0075; ADR-ACT-0285 Phase 6. The unauthenticated-visitor persona always runs and deterministically hits a forbidden API (401/403 -> http.request.rejected WARN), so log correlation is required.

ADR-ACT-0285 closure. Loads the React app then makes ONE in-page (Faro-instrumented) same-origin BFF request to a protected route (401 → WARN log carrying the propagated traceId); the harness asserts the resulting Tempo trace contains BOTH react-enterprise-app and platform-api spans (true browser→BFF distributed trace, not liveness).

dynamicScenarios.owner: ADR-0075; ADR-ACT-0285 Phase 6 sub-project A. Controlled expansion: one runtime scenario per stage-applicable persona (id persona-matrix:{personaId}). A persona is REQUIRED to be observed in Loki only when the deterministic 'persona-matrix-denial' rule says it actually logs in AND probes a resolvable forbidden API at the stage (so legitimately-skipped personas — expired-session, entitlement/quota/rate variations with no distinct Keycloak account, cross-tenant on stages without 2nd-level TLS — are best-effort, never a false missing-scenario failure).

exemptions.reason: Production-build preview verification (@playwright/test, isolated preview server). No observability backend; build integrity only. Owner ADR-0025.

Unauthenticated front-door health/headers against the real stage URL; covered by suite-registry external-smoke. Not part of the observability-correlation contract. CATEGORY prod-could-correlate-deferred: same-origin platform requests here COULD carry correlation headers; deferred as tracked future work (production smoke via playwright.prod/external.config against live traffic — not skipped for convenience).
Real Keycloak login flow (auth-e2e). Drives a 3rd-party IdP origin; correlation headers must NOT be sent to Keycloak, so this suite is intentionally uncorrelated.
Real logout/session-clear flow (auth-e2e); uncorrelated for the same IdP-origin reason as login.
Negative auth against the real stack; suite-registry external-auth-negative. Uncorrelated (touches Keycloak error surface).
Clickthrough routing reachability (real auth); suite-registry external-caddy-links. Navigates tool origins behind Caddy; uncorrelated by design.

Tenant-FQDN routing/isolation at prod; suite-registry external-tenant-prod. Driven directly via playwright.external.config; not in the correlation set. CATEGORY prod-could-correlate-deferred: same-origin platform requests here COULD carry correlation headers; deferred as tracked future work (production smoke via playwright.prod/external.config against live traffic — not skipped for convenience).
Tool-service clickthrough reachability; suite-registry external-tool-services. Uncorrelated (tool origins).
Real IdP-broker login flow; suite-registry identity-broker-login. Drives mock-oidc + Keycloak origins; uncorrelated by design.
node:test unit (NOT Playwright) for account-link redirect/merge logic; suite-registry identity-redirect-merge. No browser/API surface to correlate.

Prod admin-surface smoke (@playwright/test, playwright.prod.config); suite-registry prod-admin-tools. production-e2e group, not the correlation set. CATEGORY prod-could-correlate-deferred: same-origin platform requests here COULD carry correlation headers; deferred as tracked future work (production smoke via playwright.prod/external.config against live traffic — not skipped for convenience).

Prod API contract/metadata smoke; suite-registry prod-api-contract. production-e2e group. CATEGORY prod-could-correlate-deferred: same-origin platform requests here COULD carry correlation headers; deferred as tracked future work (production smoke via playwright.prod/external.config against live traffic — not skipped for convenience).
Prod asset integrity (unauthenticated); suite-registry prod-asset-integrity. production-e2e group.

Prod cookie-flag/security checks; suite-registry prod-cookie-security. production-e2e group. CATEGORY prod-could-correlate-deferred: same-origin platform requests here COULD carry correlation headers; deferred as tracked future work (production smoke via playwright.prod/external.config against live traffic — not skipped for convenience).

Prod tenant-isolation/error-boundary cross-cutting; suite-registry prod-cross-cutting. production-e2e group. CATEGORY prod-could-correlate-deferred: same-origin platform requests here COULD carry correlation headers; deferred as tracked future work (production smoke via playwright.prod/external.config against live traffic — not skipped for convenience).

Prod 4xx/5xx/error-UI; suite-registry prod-error-handling. Its synthetic Sentry event is asserted by e2e-sentry-assertion, not by log/trace correlation. CATEGORY prod-could-correlate-deferred: same-origin platform requests here COULD carry correlation headers; deferred as tracked future work (production smoke via playwright.prod/external.config against live traffic — not skipped for convenience).
Prod web-vitals/perf budget (unauthenticated); suite-registry prod-performance-budget. production-e2e group.
Prod security headers/CSP (unauthenticated); suite-registry prod-security-headers. production-e2e group.
